common.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
common.noEditableFields: This entity has no recorded fields to change.
common.errorBody: An unexpected error occurred. Reloading the page usually fixes it.
common.campaignLoadError: We couldn't load this campaign. It may not exist or you may not have access to it.

input.recoveryNotice: You already have an unfinished session review for this campaign.
input.summaryPlaceholder: Paste your raw session notes here…
input.addEntityDescription: Add an entity the extraction missed. It will be created when you commit this review.
input.duplicateField: Duplicate field "{{name}}". Field names must be unique.
input.commitErrorGeneric: Something went wrong committing this review. Please try again.
input.discardError: We couldn't discard this draft. Please try again.
input.loadError: We couldn't load this session's review. It may no longer be a draft.
input.commitAriaNoEntities: Commit to world state — no entities to commit
input.commitAriaPending_one: Commit to world state — {{count}} item require your decision first
input.commitAriaPending_other: Commit to world state — {{count}} items require your decision first
input.discardBody: This cannot be undone. The session review will be lost and the campaign unblocked for a new submission.

campaigns.welcomeBack: Welcome back. Use the sidebar to add a session or explore your world as it grows.
campaigns.deleteDescription: Permanently delete this campaign and all its data. This cannot be undone.
campaigns.deleteError: Failed to delete the campaign. Please try again.
campaigns.deleteConfirmBody: {{campaignName}} and all its data — sessions, actors, spaces, events, relations, and annotations — will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
campaigns.exportDescription: Download a complete JSON archive of this campaign — sessions, world state, and annotations.
campaigns.exportError: Failed to export the campaign. Please try again.
campaigns.exportTooLarge: This campaign is too large to export. Ask an admin to raise the export limit.
campaigns.gmRequired: Select a GM for this campaign
campaigns.createError: Could not create the campaign. Please try again.
campaigns.membersDescription: Invite players and editors, change roles, or remove members.
campaigns.enterEmail: Enter an email address to invite.
campaigns.inviteError: Could not invite that user. Please try again.
campaigns.roleChangeError: Could not change the role. Please try again.
campaigns.removeError: Could not remove that member. Please try again.
campaigns.loadMembersError: We couldn't load the member list. Please try again.
campaigns.removeMemberBody: {{email}} will lose access to the campaign. They can be invited again later.
campaigns.removeMemberBodyFallback: This member will lose access to the campaign. They can be invited again later.
campaigns.listLoadError: We couldn't load your campaigns. Please try again.
campaigns.createFirst: Create your first campaign to start building its world.
campaigns.askGm: Ask your GM or an admin to add you to a campaign.

proposals.approveDescription: Edit any field before approving; your edits replace the proposed values. The change is written as a new version.
proposals.vetoBody: The proposal is rejected and no version is written. This cannot be undone.
proposals.decisionError: Could not record the decision. Try again.

reviewQueue.title: Proposal review queue
reviewQueue.description: Co-signed proposals awaiting your decision. Approve (optionally editing the change) or veto.
reviewQueue.approved: Proposal approved — a new version was written.
reviewQueue.loadError: Could not load the review queue. Please refresh the page.

thread.heading: Proposed changes
thread.subtitle: Member-submitted edits awaiting co-sign and GM review — not yet canonical world state.
thread.coSignError: We couldn't co-sign this proposal. Try again.
thread.loadError: Could not load proposals. Please refresh the page.
thread.emptyActor: No proposals yet for this actor.
thread.emptySpace: No proposals yet for this space.

submitForm.sessionRequired: Select the session this change relates to
submitForm.emptyDelta: Change at least one field before proposing.
submitForm.submitError: Could not submit your proposal. Try again.
submitForm.title: Propose a change
submitForm.descriptionActor: Suggest edits to this actor. Other members can co-sign, then the GM decides.
submitForm.descriptionSpace: Suggest edits to this space. Other members can co-sign, then the GM decides.
submitForm.sessionPlaceholder: Which session does this relate to?

auth.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
auth.newPasswordMinLength: New password must be at least 12 characters
auth.passwordChangeFailed: Password change failed. Please try again.

admin.inviteDescription: Create a platform account so you can assign the user as a campaign GM. They receive a temporary password by email and set their own on first login.
admin.enterEmail: Enter an email address to invite.
admin.invitationSent: Invitation sent to {{email}}. They can now be assigned as a GM.
admin.invitationError: Could not send the invitation. Please try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.displayNameMax: Display name must be 80 characters or fewer
settings.saveError: Could not save settings. Please try again.

query.submitPrompt: Submit a question to see the answer and its sources here.
query.timeoutMessage: That query took too long to answer. Try rephrasing it or narrowing the scope, then ask again.
query.rateLimitMessage: You're sending questions too quickly. Wait a few seconds, then ask again.
query.costCapMessage: The daily question limit for this service has been reached. Please try again tomorrow.
query.genericMessage: Something went wrong answering that question. Please try again.

form.label: Ask a question about the campaign
form.placeholder: What happened to Aldric after the Battle of Thornwall?

history.loadError: Could not load the question history. Please try again.
history.empty: No questions have been asked yet.

usageNotice.body: Query Mode runs on Google's free AI tier, with daily limits shared across everyone. Please use it in moderation.

annotations.heading: Annotations
annotations.subtitle: Player commentary — not canonical world state. Any member can post; the author or a GM can delete.

annotations.deleteError: We couldn't delete that annotation. Try again.
annotations.loadError: Could not load annotations. Please refresh the page.
